message:
fix(vdbe): disable FusedOpenWriteLast peephole — drops Last jump-if-empty target

The FusedOpenWriteLast peephole replaced Last(C,P2_jump) with Noop,
silently dropping the P2 jump-if-empty target. When a table is empty,
Last should jump to P2 to skip the insert body. Without the jump,
execution falls through with uninitialized registers, inserting
garbage data (e.g., rowid 0 with invalid payload).

Disable the peephole. Keep the opcode defined for future implementation
that properly handles the jump-if-empty semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
